stories.title: Follow along in ESPN's Draftcast: Analysis for every pick
stories.summary: Get pick by pick results from each round of the 2026 NFL Draft with Draftcast on ESPN

stories.title: Greenard traded to Eagles, gets new $100M deal
stories.summary: The Eagles acquired Jonathan Greenard in a trade with the Vikings and agreed to a lucrative new deal with the star linebacker.

stories.title: Snead touts McVay 'lockstep' after tense presser
stories.summary: Rams general manager Les Snead said Friday that he and coach Sean McVay are "in lockstep" on decisions they make in the draft.

stories.title: Cards draft Beck, add ex-Canes star to QB room
stories.summary: The Cardinals drafted Carson Beck with the 65th pick, muddying an already cloudy QB situation.

stories.title: Falcons draft Terrell, unite CB with star brother
stories.summary: The Falcons selected Avieon Terrell with the No. 48 pick of the NFL draft, uniting the Clemson CB with his older brother A.J.
